rulings.Case Title: ALTHEMUS COLEMAN VS. 250 KEARNY STREET, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction; Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 19, 2011, line 5. Motion for Preliminary Injunction. Grant motion for preliminary Injunction. Grossly untimely opposition stricken (regularly noticed motion set for hearing 12/19/11 opposition filed 12/16/11) (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEN JUE VS. KATE MERRIGAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 19, 2011, line 4. Plaintiff Ken Jue's Motion for Summary Judgment. Deny motion for summary judgment. Failed to Shift Burden. 1) CCP 1161 Requries a landlord tenant relationship which is not present. Necessary element missing. 2) Forcible entry. Forceable detainer or ejectment alternatives. 3) Evidence lacking. A) Landlord's declaration not signed under Law of State of California. B) Merrigan's declaration not under penalty of perjury.
Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 19, 2011, line 2. Defendant Michael Olivas' demurrer to complaint. Off Calendar. First Amended Complaint Filed 11/15/11. (501/REQ)
